# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot automation configuration
# Includes repository definition for S3 or shared file system,
# plus create/restore example requests.

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Repository: S3
# ------------------------------------------------------------
PUT _snapshot/ops_s3_repo
{
  "type": "s3",
  "settings": {
    "bucket": "ops-elasticsearch-snapshots",
    "region": "us-east-1",
    "base_path": "elasticsearch/prod",
    "compress": true,
    "server_side_encryption": true
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Repository: Shared file system
# ------------------------------------------------------------
PUT _snapshot/ops_fs_repo
{
  "type": "fs",
  "settings": {
    "location": "/mnt/elasticsearch_snapshots",
    "compress": true
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Create snapshot manually
# ------------------------------------------------------------
PUT _snapshot/ops_s3_repo/snapshot-2026-04-18-0001?wait_for_completion=true
{
  "indices": "logs-*,metrics-*,.kibana*",
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": false
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Scheduled snapshot policy via SLM
# ------------------------------------------------------------
PUT _slm/policy/daily_ops_backup
{
  "schedule": "0 30 2 * * ?",
  "name": "<daily-ops-{now/d}>",
  "repository": "ops_s3_repo",
  "config": {
    "indices": [
      "logs-*",
      "metrics-*",
      ".kibana*"
    ],
    "ignore_unavailable": true,
    "include_global_state": false
  },
  "retention": {
    "expire_after": "30d",
    "min_count": 7,
    "max_count": 90
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) Restore snapshot
# ------------------------------------------------------------
POST _snapshot/ops_s3_repo/snapshot-2026-04-18-0001/_restore
{
  "indices": "logs-2026.04*,metrics-2026.04*",
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": false,
  "rename_pattern": "(.+)",
  "rename_replacement": "restored-$1"
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Check snapshot status
# ------------------------------------------------------------
GET _snapshot/ops_s3_repo/_all

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Check restore / cluster health
# ------------------------------------------------------------
GET _cluster/health?wait_for_status=yellow&timeout=60s
